allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs={p['name']:p['version'] for p in d['packages']}; [print\(f'{n}: {pkgs.get\(n,\\"?\\"\)}'\) for n in ['flutter_bloc','equatable','dio','retrofit','json_annotation','go_router','flutter_svg','gap','cached_network_image','flutter_secure_storage','shared_preferences','intl','cupertino_icons','freezed_annotation','build_runner','freezed','json_serializable','retrofit_generator','flutter_gen_runner','flutter_lints']]")

hooks.command: dart analyze --no-fatal-infos 2>&1 | grep -E '^(error|warning|  error|  warning)' | head -20 || true
